title: South Dakota
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in South Dakota

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in South Dakota

You can apply for Medicaid in South Dakota by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in South Dakota

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in South Dakota

Health Insurance Marketplace® in South Dakota

CHIP in South Dakota

South Dakota CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for South Dakota CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about South Dakota CHIP in South Dakota.
